text:
In the quiet town of Willow Creek, where the sun seemed to bathe everything in its gentle gold, lived Emily. Emily adored her garden. Every spring she planted new flowers, keeping them just the right amount of watered and neglected. During the summer, they basked in the warmth, and by fall, they'd transformed into a riot of colors. Her garden was a sanctuary, and every morning she would walk there, lose herself in the symphony of chirping birds and rustling leaves.

One evening, as the sun set casting golden hues across the sky, Emily noticed something unusual—a small, shiny stone nestled among the roses. Curiosity got the better of her, and she picked it up, thinking maybe it was a leftover from one of her garden art projects.

The next morning, Emily awoke to a chill she wasn't used to. She gazed at her roses, which had wilted overnight. But lo and behold, there lay the tiny stone—a
